calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion For Order Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that additional orders to respond to discovery would not result in compliance. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion Andm Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demnad For Production And Inspection Of Document'S; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
